svg.text: "AIMessage(content='Machine translation is the automated process of converting
text or speech from one natural language into another using computational
models. It typically relies on sequence-to-sequence neural networks—such as the
Transformer architecture—that learn to map source language sequences to target
language sequences. Performance is often measured with metrics like BLEU, which
compare model outputs to human reference translations.', additional_kwargs={},

svg.text: "AIMessage(content='Artificial intelligence (AI) is the field of computer
science that creates systems capable of performing tasks that normally require
human intelligence, such as learning, reasoning, perception, and
decision-making. These systems use techniques like machine learning, neural
networks, and symbolic reasoning to process data and adapt to new situations.
AI applications range from image and speech recognition to autonomous vehicles
